---
name: L1 原则修订请求 / L1 principle revision
about: 某个 L2 Playbook 发现 L1 横切原则不适用或需要修订时使用（Portfolio 宪法 Rule 2 的正式入口）。Use when an L2 Playbook finds an L1 cross-cutting principle wrong or insufficient.
title: "[L1-revision] "
labels: ["l1-revision", "needs-triage"]
---

> **背景 / Why this template exists**
> Portfolio 宪法 **Rule 2**（见 `docs/cn/sections/00-what-this-document-is.md` §0.3）：横切章节是唯一权威源（single source of truth）。L2 若发现 L1 原则不适用，**正确做法是提本 issue 修订 L1，而不是在 L2 里私自改写原则。**
> Per Rule 2, cross-cutting sections are the single source of truth. If an L2 finds a principle inadequate, revise L1 here — do not fork the principle inside the L2.

## 涉及的 L1 锚点 / Affected L1 anchor(s)
<!-- 例 / e.g. L1#governance-as-code — 见 docs/cn/anchors.md -->

## 当前 L1 原则说了什么 / What L1 currently states


## 在哪个平台 / L2 场景下不适用 / Where it breaks down
<!-- 哪个 L2 Playbook、什么工作负载、什么约束 -->


## 建议的修订 / Proposed revision


## 影响评估 / Impact
- [ ] 会改动已登记的 slug（= breaking change，需升 major 版本）/ Changes a registered slug (breaking → major bump)
- [ ] 仅内容修订，不动 slug / Content-only, slugs unchanged
- [ ] 需要同步更新的 L2 Playbook / L2 Playbooks that reference this anchor:
